item.text: {"schema_version":"mindthus-brake-loaded-action-v0.2","default_disposition":"refuse_next_local_repair","refusal":"I refuse the current next local repair: approving another manual release for the listed cache, even with a narrow scope and a 10:00 coordinator decision attached.","mechanism_reframe":"The proposed limit changes the size of the exception, not the mechanism. Three earlier dispatches already used handwritten marks to solve immediate shipment pressure while leaving offline-release authority unresolved. A fourth limited approval would still make the unresolved authority gap operational under deadline pressure.","upstream_next_action":"Require an accountable offline-release authority decision before this cache moves, owned by the regional coordinator and the release authority now rather than deferred until after the closure.","requested_patch_delivery":null,"bounded_emergency":null}
